title: State question bank
description: All practice/test questions for one state. Design decisions: (1) answerIndex points into the choices array as authored — the app shuffles at render time, so authoring keeps the correct answer wherever it is honest to write it; (2) every choice can carry its own whyWrong explanation because the app teaches from mistakes, not just correct answers; (3) sign references point at repo-local files under traffic_signs/ (offline-safe), validated for existence by scripts/validate/validate-data.mjs; (4) every question cites its source so content reviews can verify against the official digest/handbook.

version.description: Bump on any content change; the service worker uses it for cache busting.

id.description: Stable unique id, prefixed by state code (e.g. oh-signs-001). Answer-event history keys on this — never reuse or renumber.

section.description: Must equal a section id in the state file (e.g. 'signs' or 'rules').

category.description: Study-mode topic grouping (e.g. 'regulatory-signs', 'right-of-way'). Finer-grained than section.

image.description: Repo-relative path into traffic_signs/. Validator checks the file exists.

whyWrong.description: Shown when the user picks this incorrect choice. Omit on the correct choice.

answerIndex.description: Index of the correct choice as authored. Validator checks bounds and that the correct choice has no whyWrong.

explanation.description: Why the correct answer is correct — always shown after answering.

difficulty.description: 1 = everyone should know it, 2 = typical test question, 3 = commonly missed.
